description: Set up build environment - ensure the project compiles successfully with ./gradlew assembleDebug using Java 17.
steps: Set Java 17 as active using mise (mise use java@17 or equivalent)
Set ANDROID_HOME if needed (the Android SDK should be downloaded by AGP automatically)
Run ./gradlew assembleDebug from /projects/sandbox/Sketchware-Pro/ to verify baseline compiles
If mock google-services.json is needed, the build.gradle preBuild task handles it automatically
acceptance_criteria: ./gradlew assembleDebug completes successfully with BUILD SUCCESSFUL
findings: Build succeeds with Java 17 (mise use java@17). Android SDK must be installed at /opt/android-sdk with platforms;android-36 and build-tools;36.0.0. local.properties must point sdk.dir=/opt/android-sdk. Build takes ~4.5 minutes. The preBuild task auto-creates google-services.json. Deprecation and unchecked warnings exist but are non-blocking. mise.toml created in project root to pin Java 17.
